missing.doc: WR-D-31-1 'Wytyczne projektowania skrzyżowań drogowych. Część 1: Wymagania podstawowe' (eff. 2022-11-30)
missing.why_essential: Defines selection criteria and basic design requirements for at-grade junctions (skrzyżowania) — junction type choice, capacity/safety basis, geometric framework. Foundational for all at-grade junction design; we have zero junction coverage.

missing.doc: WR-D-31-2 'Wytyczne projektowania skrzyżowań drogowych. Część 2: Skrzyżowania zwykłe i skanalizowane' (eff. 2022-11-30)
missing.why_essential: The core at-grade junction geometry standard: simple and channelized junctions, turning lanes, islands, left/right-turn lane lengths, channelization geometry. Indispensable core geometric topic entirely absent from our set.

missing.doc: WR-D-31-3 'Wytyczne projektowania skrzyżowań drogowych. Część 3: Ronda' (eff. 2022-11-30)
missing.why_essential: Roundabout geometric design (single/multi-lane, turbo) — a primary at-grade junction form in current Polish practice; not covered anywhere in our holdings.

missing.doc: WR-D-32-1 'Wytyczne projektowania węzłów drogowych. Część 1: Wymagania podstawowe' (eff. 2022-07-13)
missing.why_essential: Basic requirements for grade-separated interchanges (węzły) — interchange type selection, layout principles, design framework. Required entry point for interchange design; missing.

missing.doc: WR-D-32-2 'Wytyczne projektowania węzłów drogowych. Część 2: Elementy węzłów i wyposażenie techniczne' (eff. 2022-07-13)
missing.why_essential: Interchange geometric elements — ramps, merge/diverge (wyłączanie/włączanie), weaving sections (przeplatanie), acceleration/deceleration lanes, ramp alignment. This is THE document for weaving/merge/diverge geometry, completely absent from our set.

missing.doc: WR-D-22-4 'Wytyczne projektowania odcinków dróg zamiejskich. Część 4: Katalog typowych przekrojów poprzecznych' (eff. 2023-01-16)
missing.why_essential: The catalog of typical cross-sections (lane/shoulder/median widths per road class). WR-D-22-2 covers cross-section shaping principles but the actual dimensioned cross-section catalog is this separate part. Needed for complete cross-section coverage.

missing.doc: WR-D-22-1 'Wytyczne projektowania odcinków dróg zamiejskich. Część 1: Wymagania podstawowe' (eff. 2022-12-19)
missing.why_essential: Companion 'basic requirements' part that sets road classes, design-speed framework and governing assumptions on which the Część 2 geometric values depend; gives the rationale and parameter context for WR-D-22-2.

missing.doc: WR-D-21 'Wytyczne wyznaczania skrajni dróg zamiejskich i ulic' (eff. 2022-09-19)
missing.why_essential: Clearance envelope (skrajnia) determination — horizontal/vertical clearances. Cross-section completeness and sight/clearance design reference this; not held.

notes: Authoritative current Polish geometric set = Ministry of Infrastructure 'Wzorce i Standardy / WR-D' series (all free on gov.pl/web/infrastruktura), backed by the binding regulation Dz.U. 2022 poz. 1518 (przepisy techniczno-budowlane dróg publicznych, in force since 21-09-2022; WR-D are recommended/non-binding but are the de-facto detailed design standard). For rural road geometry the relevant family is WR-D-22 (parts 1-5) + WR-D-21 (skrajnia). CROSS-SECTION: WR-D-22-2 'Kształtowanie geometryczne' contains cross-section SHAPING principles plus full horizontal/vertical alignment, sight distance, superelevation and lane widening — so core line geometry is well covered by what we have. The dimensioned cross-section CATALOG is a SEPARATE part, WR-D-22-4. JUNCTIONS/NODES are an entirely separate group (WR-D-30): WR-D-31 = skrzyżowania (at-grade: requirements / simple+channelized / roundabouts), WR-D-32 = węzły (interchanges: requirements / elements incl. ramps, merge-diverge, weaving). We hold NONE of the WR-D-30 group, so at-grade junctions AND interchange/weaving geometry are uncovered. topic_coverage cross_section marked true because WR-D-22-2 covers cross-section shaping, but the catalog (22-4) is still listed as missing for completeness. Verdict PARTIAL: we have only 1 of ~11 WR-D geometric parts plus the regulation — strong on plain-line geometry, zero on junctions/nodes which the task flags as the priority gap.
recommended_actions: Acquire the full WR-D-30 junction/node group (WR-D-31-1/2/3 + WR-D-32-1/2) — these are the priority gap covering at-grade junctions, roundabouts, ramps, merge/diverge and weaving; all free PDFs at gov.pl/web/infrastruktura/wrd-30-skrzyzowania-i-wezly.
Add WR-D-22-4 (Katalog typowych przekrojów poprzecznych) to complete cross-section coverage with dimensioned standard sections.
Add WR-D-22-1 (Wymagania podstawowe) for the road-class / design-speed framework that underpins the values in WR-D-22-2, and WR-D-21 (skrajnia) for clearance envelopes.
Optionally add WR-D-33 (zjazdy/wjazdy — accesses) and WR-D-22-3 (wyposażenie) for a fully self-contained rural-road geometric package.
All WR-D are free on gov.pl; verify each part is still the current 'wersja 01' (check for newer consultations, e.g. WR-D-22-1-02 draft seen on PIIB) before treating as authoritative.
